product_highlights: Avobenzone - broad-spectrum UVA oil-soluble chemical filter
Octinoxate - highly effective UVB chemical filter
Oxybenzone - broad-spectrum UVB/UVA II chemical filter
Competitive bulk pricing for cosmetic manufacturers
notes: Balaji Fine Chem is an Indian specialty chemicals supplier providing key organic UV filter raw materials including avobenzone, octinoxate, and oxybenzone for the personal care and sunscreen industry. Their UV filter portfolio covers UVA and UVB protection across a broad wavelength spectrum. As a bulk raw material supplier based in India, Balaji Fine Chem offers competitive pricing for cosmetic manufacturers globally.
